title: Agent status tracking hook with polling and WebSocket updates
purpose: Provides real-time monitoring of agent status through HTTP polling and WebSocket events, managing loading states and error handling.
module_context: Exports a React hook that manages agent status state with initial loading, polling, and WebSocket event listeners.

steps.content: Initialize the agent status state with default values including loading indicator.
Define an asynchronous function to fetch status from the API endpoint.
Set up polling interval to repeatedly fetch status at configured intervals.
Add WebSocket event listener for real-time status updates from the window.
Perform initial status fetch when the hook mounts.
Return the current agent status state to the consuming component.
Send an HTTP request to the status API endpoint.
IF the response is not successful, throw an error with status code.
Parse the JSON response from the API.
Validate that the response contains a valid status field.
IF the status is valid, update the state with new status and message.
IF the status is invalid, preserve the previous state but clear loading indicator.
IF an error occurs during fetch, log the error and preserve previous state.
